test.name: Microsoft.DotNet.SignTool.Tests.SignToolTests.SignMsiEngine
test.reason: This test requires Windows to run.

test.name: Microsoft.DotNet.SignTool.Tests.SignToolTests.ValidateParseFileExtensionEntriesForSameCollisionPriorityIdFails
test.output: warning SIGN003: An empty list of files to sign was passed as parameter. SignToolTask starting. DryRun: True Signing mode: Real MicroBuild signing logs will be in (Signing*.binlog): LogDir MicroBuild signing configuration will be in (Round*.proj): TempDir error : Multiple certificates for extension '.js' defined for CollisionPriorityId '123'. There should be one certificate per extension per collision priority id. SignToolTask execution finished.

test.name: Microsoft.DotNet.SignTool.Tests.SignToolTests.DoubleNestedContainer
test.reason: This test requires Windows to run.

test.name: Microsoft.DotNet.SignTool.Tests.SignToolTests.BadWixToolsetPath
